title: Maia Execution Activity Extension
description: Optional execution-focused extension payload for ACP activity events. Encodes the richer Theatre and computer-use state used by Maia applications.

stage.description: High-level theatre stage such as understand, breakdown, analyze, execute, review, confirm, done, blocked, or error.

status.description: Execution status such as pending, running, completed, failed, blocked, or needs_input.

title.description: Short user-facing label for the current activity.

detail.description: Longer user-facing description for the current activity.

scene_surface.description: Primary surface being rendered, such as system, browser, email, document, docs, sheets, pdf, snapshot, api, or chat.

scene_family.description: Logical family grouping used for routing and skinning.

ui_target.description: Hint describing the intended target region or UI element class.

event_index.description: Monotonic event index for replay-aware UIs.

replay_importance.description: Replay importance hint for trimming or emphasizing events.

scene_ref.description: Optional reference to a scene identity shared across events.

snapshot_ref.description: Optional reference to a snapshot identity shared across events.

graph_node_id.description: Optional graph node identifier from upstream orchestration.

metadata.description: Execution-specific metadata for Theatre and runtime consumers.

raw_data.description: Original source event data from the host application.

raw_metadata.description: Original source event metadata from the host application.

browser_state.description: Browser and computer-use state used by rich Theatre browser scenes.

email_state.description: Email composition state used by Theatre email scenes.

document_state.description: Document and PDF viewing state used by Theatre document scenes.
